Schema is a JSON array of uniform objects with only project, path, and root fields
No code symbols or extra metadata are present

Uniform project and root across every entry

Relative asset paths from the project root
concerns: No versioning, timestamp, or author metadata
No stated rationale for why these six files are grouped
notes: This is a simple manifest of claude-ds preview HTML files assigned to wave-002 batch 031.

contribution: It contributes a precise, scoped manifest of claude-ds preview HTML targets that a fused system can use to locate and include the same set of design artifacts in a wave-002 batch.
